💫

where it started

After Camp

We met in camp and just clicked. Like, properly clicked. We had our own little bubble where everything else kind of just faded out. And then this was our first time seeing each other after. Still the same feeling.

tap to continue
🤍

it had been a while

Still The Same

We hadn't seen each other in a long time. But the second we did, it was easy again. No awkwardness, nothing. Just us being us. That made me really happy.

tap to continue
🌙

our mall day

Laughing, Holding Hands & Ice Cream

Just a really really good day. Walking around, talking about everything and nothing. Her trying to hide her laugh but she never can. And ice cream to end it. I think about this day a lot.

tap to continue
🦋

just because

She Wore My Durag

No plans. We just wanted to see each other. She put on my durag and honestly looked better in it than I ever did. I wasn't even surprised.

tap to continue
✨

always

Us

I like this one a lot.

tap to continue

Dear Iman

I wanted to do something small for you today. Because you deserve to hear nice things more often.

You have this thing about you. I don't know how to explain it. You just make everything feel lighter. A normal day becomes a good day when you're there. And I notice new things about you all the time. Little things that make me smile.

Your heart is really beautiful, you know that? The way you care about people, the way you laugh, the way you just... are. I'm grateful Allah let me know you. I really am.

I pray this year is so so good to you. That it brings you peace and happiness and all the things you quietly hope for.

Happy Birthday, Iman. You're special to me. 🤍

from me, to you ♡
tap to continue

Duas For You

✦ ✦ ✦

بارك الله لك في عمرك وعافيتك

"May Allah bless you in your age and in your health."

اللّهُمَّ احْفَظْهَا وَبَارِكْ فِي حَيَاتِهَا وَاجْعَلْهَا مِنَ السُّعَدَاءِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرة

"O Allah, protect her, bless her life, and make her among the happy ones in this world and the Hereafter."

أسأل الله أن يديم عليكِ نعمة الصحة والسعادة وراحة البال

"I ask Allah to bestow upon you continuous health, happiness, and peace of mind."

جعلكِ الله من عباده الصالحين وأسعدكِ في الدارَين

"May Allah make you among His righteous servants and grant you joy in both worlds."

آمين يا رب العالمين

a little piece of us
